worldData.instructions:
MOVE — stir the droplet
CLICK — poke it; real oscillation modes ring and interfere, then damp

A water droplet in zero-g, wobbling by actual Rayleigh-Lamb surface-mode physics — each mode rings at its true frequency and damps at its true rate.

stepHooks.author: claude-opus
stepHooks.description: Rayleigh-Lamb droplet, tuned: calm at rest, big poke, long ring.
